name: Tortellini/White Sauce Jo Anne Pollak Xwdb50b
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet.
2. Add mushrooms, garlic, and prosciutto to the skillet.
3. Saute for 2 to 3 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
4. Add peas, heavy cream, and grated Romano cheese to the skillet.
5. Cook until the sauce thickens.
6. Cook the tortellini according to package directions, then drain.
7. Add the cooked tortellini to the skillet with the sauce.
8. Toss until well coated.
9. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
10. Serve immediately. Serves 4.
